organization_id.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

agent_name.description: The name that will be shown or spoken to users.

model.description: The language model to use (e.g., gpt-4.1-mini).

voice_id.description: The voice ID for the agent.

start_speaker.description: Who speaks first: agent or user.

x-codeSamples.label: JavaScript
cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST "https://development.ravan.ai/api/v1/agents" \
    -H "X-Api-Key: <token> " \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{
      "organization_id": "org_9f2k1",
      "widget_settings_id": 12,
      "name": "Support line",
      "agent_name": "Ava",
      "model": "gpt-4.1-mini",
      "voice_id": "alloy",
      "temperature": 0.4,
      "enable_voicemail_detection": true,
      "ivr_options": {
        "1": "sales",
        "2": "support"
      },
      "selected_tools": {
        "crm_lookup": true
      },
      "start_speaker": "agent"
    }'

x-codeSamples.label: JavaScript
cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X GET "https://development.ravan.ai/api/v1/agents?organization_id=org_9f2k1&limit=20&offset=0" \
    -H "X-Api-Key: <token>" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json"

phone_number.description: Phone number to purchase (E.164 format, e.g. +14155552671).

x-codeSamples.label: JavaScript
cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST "https://development.ravan.ai/api/v1/phone-numbers/buy" \
    -H "X-Api-Key: <token>" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{
      "phone_number": "+14155552671",
      "price": 1.0,
      "per_minute_price_inbound": 1,
      "per_minute_price_outbound": 2
    }'

example.message: Validation Error: 'client_id' and 'client_secret' are required for Twilio.

friendly_name.description: Human-readable name for this telephony config.

x-codeSamples.label: JavaScript
cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST "https://development.ravan.ai/api/v1/create/telephony" \
    -H "X-Api-Key: <token>" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{
      "type": "twilio",
      "owner_type": "organization",
      "friendly_name": "My Twilio Account",
      "client_id": "ACXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX",
      "client_secret": "your_auth_token_here"
    }'

x-codeSamples.label: JavaScript
cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST "https://development.ravan.ai/api/v1/phone-numbers/import" \
    -H "X-Api-Key: <token>" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{
      "phone": "+14155552671",
      "type": "sip",
      "name": "Main SIP Trunk",
      "termination_uri": "sip:14155552671@sip.example.com",
      "sip_username": "admin",
      "sip_password": "secr3t"
    }'
